name: cubicle-kingdom
description: 2D pixel office sim where AI coworkers have hidden agendas. Talk freely, survive the politics, and learn to read the room.

name: RetentionIQ
description: Production-style MLOps platform for SaaS churn prediction, LTV forecasting, SHAP explainability, retention recommendations, and drift monitoring.

name: PrecedentIQ
description: PrecedentIQ is a Canadian legal precedent retrieval engine that uses hybrid search, citation signals, case-level ranking, and RAG to surface relevant case law from Supreme Court of Canada decisions.

name: SignalDesk-AI-Multi-Agent-Product-Intelligence-Platform
description: Multi-agent product intelligence platform that monitors public feedback, analyzes sentiment, clusters recurring complaints, extracts feature requests, and generates executive insights using local LLMs.

name: first-contributions
description: 🚀✨ Help beginners to contribute to open source projects

name: Eco-art
description: a django based website , where eco art creators can come and sell thier art
